name: ask-claude-ghostty
description: Expose the local Ghostty/libghostty-backed headless Claude runner to Codex as an MCP tool.

interface.shortDescription: Ask the local Claude Code CLI through a Ghostty-backed headless terminal.
interface.longDescription: Ask Claude Ghostty exposes an ask_claude_ghostty MCP tool that invokes the local ghostty-claude-headless binary, which runs Claude Code in a real PTY with libghostty terminal parsing and a standalone-terminal environment.
defaultPrompt: Use ask_claude_ghostty to ask local Claude for a second opinion.
